function.description:
Controls the lights in a specified room.
Input: room (string) - Room location.
       action (string) - Action to perform ("on", "off")
Output: status (string) - Light control confirmation
function.name: lights_control

function.description:
Controls the blinds in a specified room.
Input: room (string) - Room location.
       action (string) - Action to perform ("raise", "lower", "stop")
Output: status (string) - Blind control confirmation
function.name: blind_control

function.description:
Controls a specified device.
Input: device (string) - Device name.
       action (string) - Action to perform ("on", "off")
Output: status (string) - Device control confirmation
function.name: device_control

function.description:
Controls a specified mode.
Input: mode (string) - Mode name.
       action (string) - Action to perform ("on", "off")
Output: status (string) - Mode control confirmation
function.name: mode_control
